mapper.sql: id, emp_id, start_date, end_date, company, position
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM emp_expr WHERE emp_id = #{empId} ORDER BY start_date DESC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO emp_expr (emp_id, start_date, end_date, company, position) VALUES
(#{item.empId}, #{item.startDate}, #{item.endDate}, #{item.company}, #{item.position})
